title: Cabezones!
description: Turn the game into chaos with giant heads! This mod adds fun characters with huge heads.
body:
![A pixel-art hunter with a shotgun stands next to a dog, above the word “CABEZONES!” in brick-style letters.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89c4b490aac62d3a176451e5a6f0ab44282a2504.png)

**This is a mod in development that adds a new ‘Cabezones’ mafia to the game, each with different abilities.
**

The mod adds the Cabezones, a group of strange mobs with oversized heads that make them stand out instantly.

Not all of them are dangerous, but don’t get too comfortable… some can react in unexpected ways. There’s a bit of everything: some are chill, others are aggressive, and each one has its own behavior.

For now, the mod is focused on these mobs, but the plan is to expand it over time with more variants, abilities, and weird stuff related to the Cabezones.
